# Vidacure

> Vidacure is a Swedish digital healthcare provider for sustainable, medically-supervised weight loss. The program combines approved weight-loss medication (such as GLP-1 agonists) with personal coaching, lab tests, and continuous follow-up from licensed clinicians. Care is delivered in Swedish and English to patients in Sweden.

Key facts:
- Company: Vidacure (Albafides Care AB)
- Country served: Sweden (SE)
- Languages: Swedish (default), English
- Focus: obesity medicine, medical weight management
- Medical content is reviewed by licensed clinicians (e.g. Selma Mehr, specialist physician in family medicine).

## Main pages (Swedish)
- [Home](https://vidacure.se/): Program overview, how it works, pricing, and FAQ.
- [About us](https://vidacure.se/aboutus): The clinical and coaching team behind Vidacure.
- [Privacy policy](https://vidacure.se/privacy): How Albafides Care AB (Vidacure) processes personal data (GDPR).

## Educational articles (Swedish)
- [What is obesity?](https://vidacure.se/article/what-is-obesity): Obesity as a chronic medical condition — how it is measured (BMI), why it matters, and treatment options.
- [Treating obesity](https://vidacure.se/article/treating-obesity): How obesity changes hormones and metabolism, and how medications and lifestyle support long-term weight management.
- [Women's health and obesity](https://vidacure.se/article/women-health-obesity): How overweight and obesity affect fertility, pregnancy, long-term health, and mental well-being in women.
- [Nutrition and obesity](https://vidacure.se/article/nutrition-obesity): What research says about diet in obesity — regular meals, protein, fibre and slow-release carbohydrates for blood sugar, satiety and sustainable weight loss.
- [Exercise and obesity](https://vidacure.se/article/exercise-obesity): How physical activity affects weight, insulin sensitivity and metabolic health, and how to find a sustainable form of exercise as part of treatment.
- [Semaglutide vs tirzepatide (Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro)](https://vidacure.se/article/semaglutide-vs-tirzepatide): Evidence-based comparison of the GLP-1 medication semaglutide (Ozempic, Wegovy) and the dual GIP/GLP-1 medication tirzepatide (Mounjaro) for weight loss — mechanisms, expected weight loss, side effects and price differences.

## Notes
- Educational content is for general information and is not a substitute for individual medical advice.
- Sources cited in articles include the World Health Organization and 1177 Vårdguiden.
- Contact: info@vidacure.se
